title: Introducing Alttene Ventures
excerpt: One studio, one product, two initiatives. Here's what Alttene Ventures is, why it exists, and what we're building first.
content:
Every company has an origin story. Ours is embarrassingly simple: too many good coffee chats, and a growing suspicion that they were the most productive thing on our calendar.

What Alttene is

Alttene Ventures is a venture studio. We build our own products, we advise other people's companies, and we give back to the communities that made us. That translates into exactly three things today:

  1. Koffeechat — our flagship product. A platform that matches people for short, meaningful conversations.

  2. Fisayo.org — our giving-back initiative, sharing opportunities, guidance, and mentorship.

  3. Alto Partners — our consulting firm, helping organizations move faster on strategy, product, and growth.

Why a studio and not just a startup?

Because the three feed each other. Building Koffeechat gives Alto Partners real operating scar tissue — the kind of advice that only comes from shipping. Consulting keeps us close to problems outside our own bubble. And Fisayo.org keeps us honest about why any of it matters.

What to expect here

This blog is our studio notebook. We'll write about product decisions on Koffeechat, lessons from Alto Partners engagements, opportunities moving through Fisayo.org, and the occasional strong opinion about coffee.

If any of that sounds like your kind of conversation — you know what we'd suggest. Let's have a chat.
author: Fisayo
